title: EventGatewayACLRule
description: A Kafka ACL rule to apply to virtual cluster traffic

resource_type.description: This rule applies to access only for type of resource

action.description: How to handle the request if the rule matches

operations.description: Types of Kafka operations to match against. Note that not every operation can apply to every resource type.

resource_names.description: If any of these entries match, the resource name matches for this rule. A maximum of 50 entries are allowed.
